events.title: MUSIC BINGO!
JJ's Fusion
Live Music with Johnny Low
events.description: Johnny is a seasoned musician and passionate live performer based in Roseville, California. With roots in the vibrant Seattle and Arizona music scenes, he's spent decades touring, recording, and playing alongside some of the best in the business.Since picking up the guitar at age 15, Johnny has developed a unique sound that blends the soul of Americana with the energy of rock and the storytelling heart of country. His solo performances offer an exciting mix of alt-country, modern and classic rock, indie hits, and fresh takes on 80s and 90s favorites—all delivered with signature guitar work and a powerful, engaging vocal style.A true music lover, Johnny keeps his sets current while always honoring the classics. His shows are lively, heartfelt, and always entertaining—crafted to keep audiences engaged and coming back for more.In addition to covers, Johnny performs his own original music—raw, relatable songs with a distinct Americana and country edge. His latest singles, "Her Bad Company" and "Dirty Old Country Bar," are available to stream here on the site. A full-length album is currently in the works.Whether you catch him at a local venue or a special event, Johnny brings experience, talent, and authenticity to every performance.Johnny is also currently involved in an original recording/song writing project called "LT!" with long time friend and musician Bryan Talbot from Los Angeles California. Click the button below for their YouTube page to see some recent video creations. (Recurring: Does not Repeat)

events.title: On Stage with 120 Minutes
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by 120 Minutes. Sacramento’s ultimate time machine to the golden age of rock — this powerhouse band slams through the best of 90’s and early 2000’s alternative, grunge, and hard-hitting rock with raw energy and a rebel soul. Fronted by both the gritty vocals of Jon Grant and Owen Myers, the band features their ripping guitar work and keyboard melodies, respectively. Guitarists Alex Schmidt and Brian Ilagan shred with precision and passion, while Dave Wong lays down the thunder on bass and Gar Garvey keeps the heartbeat pounding on drums. From the anthems of The Smashing Pumpkins, Pearl Jam and Alice In Chains to the pulse of Foo Fighters, CAKE, Bush and more, 120 Minutes doesn’t just play the soundtrack of a generation—they ignite it. This band is a must-see for anyone who ever wore Doc Martens, blasted their car stereo, or just wanted to rock without apology. Get ready to relive the era when guitars ruled, angst was an art form, and every track hit like a shot of adrenaline. 120 Minutes brings it all back—louder, tighter, and harder than ever. Are you ready to feel it again? You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.description: Come join us at the High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Jax Hammer. Jack Brizek, one of Sacramento Valley’s most talented guitarists, formed Jax Hammer to break free from genre constraints. This four-man band covers popular mainstream and blues rock songs, delivering tight vocal harmonies and impressive instrumental performances. Jack and keyboardist Kevin Whalen shine as lead vocalists, while bassist Carl Borden and drummer Mick Voss lay down a solid rhythmic foundation. Jax Hammer’s repertoire includes hits from The Beatles, The Who, Rolling Stones, Tom Petty, and many more. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Life in the Fast Lane. Since their debut in 1993, they have earned their place in the music industry as “AMERICA’S MOST AUTHENTIC” Eagles Tribute Band. Class of 85 is an all 80’s new wave tribute band that brings high dance energy with synth soaked sounds of Depeche Mode, Inxs, The cure and many more! Come dance and sing along to the iconic anthems that defined a generation! Shoulder pads and members only jackets optional — a great night guaranteed! You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their Facebook page. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Los Del Centro
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Los Del Centro. Get ready to dance and celebrate with Los Del Centro, Sacramento’s own high-energy grupo sierreño! Known for their infectious rhythms and genuine regional Mexican flavor, Los Del Centro brings the sound of the norteño tradition to life with memorable live performances that get every crowd moving. Whether you’re into classic rancheras, corridos, or contemporary sierreño grooves, this show delivers authentic vibes and bold musical flair. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.description: Join us at High-Hand Brewery as we launch our new Hump Day Jam Nite! Every Wednesday, we’re opening the stage to musicians of all kinds—bring your axe, your voice, your full band, or just the urge to play. events.title: On Stage with APPLE Z
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by APPLE Z. This multi-award-winning cover band who has earned their reputation as one of Northern California’s premier working bands. APPLE Z was inducted into the SAMMIES (Sacramento Area Music Awards) Hall of Fame after being awarded “Best Cover Band” for three consecutive years. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their Facebook page. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Manzanita
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Manzanita. They are a Indie Folk band from Northern California with blends of Americana and Country. A Manzanita performance is a huge sound from two men. Aaron Shively’s pedal steel playing is seasoned and tasteful with a ‘Hammond organ-like’ tone. His mandolin will delight any bluegrass lover. Nick Foster fronts with his parlor-style acoustic guitar, harmonica, kick drum and tambourine simultaneously. Original songwriting with storytelling, catchy vocal melodies and powerful harmonies give this duo a classic and eclectic sound all can enjoy. You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Cougar Adams
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Cougar Adams. Since 2008, Cougar Adams has rocked audiences with their powerful 6-piece tribute to heartland rockers John Cougar Mellencamp and Bryan Adams. Led by KC (Casey Corrigan), whose voice channels the emotion of both legends, the band delivers hits like “Jack and Diane,” “Summer of 69,” and more. Backed by a skilled ensemble, their performances capture the essence of Mellencamp and Adams, making each show a nostalgic journey through time. Don’t miss the chance to experience this soul-penetrating musical homage! You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website.

A regular fixture in Sacramento’s vibrant music scene, Halfway Inn consistently leaves their mark on diverse venues across the region. Their live shows are nothing short of spectacular, as they pour their hearts and souls into each performance, captivating the audience with an unforgettable blend of raw talent and captivating showmanship. Don’t miss the chance to experience Halfway Inn in action – it’s not just a concert; it’s a musical journey that will leave you craving more. Here’s what you can expect… 70’s Vintage Hard Rock: UFO, THIN LIZZY, BAD COMPANY, LED ZEPPELIN, AC/DC, QUEEN,LYNYRD SKYNYRD 80’s Arena Rock: Y&T, EDDIE MONEY, DANZIG, SCORPIONS,IRON MAIDEN, POISON, BRYAN ADAMS, WHITESNAKE 90’s ALTERNATIVE/GRUNGE: PEARL JAM, THE TOADIES,BUSH, STP, LIVE, SEVEN MARY THREE 2000’s Bangers: BUCK CHERRY, FINGER ELEVEN, PUDDLE OF MUD, DEAD DAISIES AND MANY MORE! events.title: On Stage with 120 Minutes
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by 120 Minutes. Sacramento’s ultimate time machine to the golden age of rock — this powerhouse band slams through the best of 90’s and early 2000’s alternative, grunge, and hard-hitting rock with raw energy and a rebel soul. Fronted by both the gritty vocals of Jon Grant and Owen Myers, the band features their ripping guitar work and keyboard melodies, respectively. Guitarists Alex Schmidt and Brian Ilagan shred with precision and passion, while Dave Wong lays down the thunder on bass and Gar Garvey keeps the heartbeat pounding on drums. From the anthems of The Smashing Pumpkins, Pearl Jam and Alice In Chains to the pulse of Foo Fighters, CAKE, Bush and more, 120 Minutes doesn’t just play the soundtrack of a generation—they ignite it. This band is a must-see for anyone who ever wore Doc Martens, blasted their car stereo, or just wanted to rock without apology. Get ready to relive the era when guitars ruled, angst was an art form, and every track hit like a shot of adrenaline. 120 Minutes brings it all back—louder, tighter, and harder than ever. Are you ready to feel it again? You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

Their high-energy show is built to ignite memories, create new ones, and keep the dance floor moving from the first chord to the final encore. events.title: On Stage with 120 Minutes
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by 120 Minutes. Sacramento’s ultimate time machine to the golden age of rock — this powerhouse band slams through the best of 90’s and early 2000’s alternative, grunge, and hard-hitting rock with raw energy and a rebel soul. Fronted by both the gritty vocals of Jon Grant and Owen Myers, the band features their ripping guitar work and keyboard melodies, respectively. Guitarists Alex Schmidt and Brian Ilagan shred with precision and passion, while Dave Wong lays down the thunder on bass and Gar Garvey keeps the heartbeat pounding on drums. From the anthems of The Smashing Pumpkins, Pearl Jam and Alice In Chains to the pulse of Foo Fighters, CAKE, Bush and more, 120 Minutes doesn’t just play the soundtrack of a generation—they ignite it. This band is a must-see for anyone who ever wore Doc Martens, blasted their car stereo, or just wanted to rock without apology. Get ready to relive the era when guitars ruled, angst was an art form, and every track hit like a shot of adrenaline. 120 Minutes brings it all back—louder, tighter, and harder than ever. Are you ready to feel it again? You can learn more about them by clicking here to visit their website. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.

events.title: On Stage with Halfway Inn
events.description: Come join us at High-Hand Brewery to hear a live performance by Halfway Inn. Prepare to be electrified by the dynamic energy of Halfway Inn, a powerhouse Hard Rock band that demands your attention. Their electrifying performances transport you through the greatest hits of past decades, igniting the stage with their relentless passion for music. A regular fixture in Sacramento’s vibrant music scene, Halfway Inn consistently leaves their mark on diverse venues across the region. Their live shows are nothing short of spectacular, as they pour their hearts and souls into each performance, captivating the audience with an unforgettable blend of raw talent and captivating showmanship. Don’t miss the chance to experience Halfway Inn in action – it’s not just a concert; it’s a musical journey that will leave you craving more. Here’s what you can expect… 70’s Vintage Hard Rock: UFO, THIN LIZZY, BAD COMPANY, LED ZEPPELIN, AC/DC, QUEEN,LYNYRD SKYNYRD 80’s Arena Rock: Y&T, EDDIE MONEY, DANZIG, SCORPIONS,IRON MAIDEN, POISON, BRYAN ADAMS, WHITESNAKE 90’s ALTERNATIVE/GRUNGE: PEARL JAM, THE TOADIES,BUSH, STP, LIVE, SEVEN MARY THREE 2000’s Bangers: BUCK CHERRY, FINGER ELEVEN, PUDDLE OF MUD, DEAD DAISIES AND MANY MORE! Every Wednesday, we’re opening the stage to musicians of all kinds—bring your axe, your voice, your full band, or just the urge to play. When you arrive, find Melissa to sign up and lock in your spot. High-Hand’s pro backline will be ready for you. Solo players will be paired up into spontaneous jam groups, and together you’ll decide what to play—keeping it loose, creative, and fun. It’s all about rocking out, connecting with fellow musicians, and celebrating the amazing music community we’re surrounded by. Each week will also feature a guest band to keep the night energized and inspiring. Come jam, hang out, and make your Wednesday groove. Only guests 18 and older may attend our “On Stage” concerts.
